---
title: "InvestingJournal"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    theme: journal
    highlights : tango
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(DT)
library(here)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
library(fontawesome)
library(formattable)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(scales)

# filepaths
data   <- here("01_Data")
inter  <- here("02_Intermediate")
output <- here("03_Output")
prog   <- here("04_Programs")

source(here("scripts", "config.R"))

balance                   <- readRDS(file.path(inter, "balance.RDS"))
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=2}

rh <- balance %>%
  filter(name %in% rh_accounts) %>%
  filter(date > ymd(rh_start_date))
  

dates_clean <- rh %>% 
  mutate(miss = as.numeric(is.na(value_usd))) %>%
  group_by(date)%>%
  mutate(miss_date = max(miss))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(miss_date == 0) %>%
  pull(date) %>% unique()

tbl <- rh %>% 
  group_by(date) %>% 
  summarise(value_usd = sum(value_usd)) %>% 
  select(date, "Current" = value_usd) %>% 
  mutate(month = month(date)) %>% 
  group_by(month) %>% 
  slice_max(date) %>% 
  ungroup()

# Parameters (edit in scripts/config.R)
initial_balance <- investment_initial_balance
monthly_rate    <- investment_monthly_rate
months          <- investment_projection_months

# Create vectors
Month <- 0:months
Balance <- numeric(length = months + 1)
Interest <- numeric(length = months + 1)
Accrued_Interest <- numeric(length = months + 1)

# Initial values
Balance[1] <- initial_balance
Interest[1] <- NA
Accrued_Interest[1] <- NA

# Loop to calculate compound growth
for (i in 2:(months + 1)) {
  Interest[i] <- Balance[i - 1] * monthly_rate
  Accrued_Interest[i] <- sum(Interest[2:i], na.rm = TRUE)
  Balance[i] <- Balance[i - 1] + Interest[i]
}

# Combine into a data frame
goals <- data.frame(
  Month,
  Goal = Balance
)

# Optional: format as currency
goals$Goal <- dollar(goals$Goal)

tbl_goals <- tbl %>%
  mutate(row = row_number() - 1) %>%
  left_join(goals, by = c("row" = "Month")) %>%
  mutate(
    Goal = as.numeric(gsub("[$,]", "", Goal)),   # Convert formatted currency → numeric
    Current = Current
  ) %>%
  arrange(date)

# Adjust goals iteratively
for (i in 2:nrow(tbl_goals)) {
  prev_actual <- tbl_goals$Current[i - 1]
  prev_goal   <- tbl_goals$Goal[i - 1]

  if (prev_actual < prev_goal) {
    # Reset goal baseline to actual
    tbl_goals$Goal[i] <- prev_goal 
  }
}

```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE}
current <- tbl_goals$Current[length(tbl_goals$Current)]
delta <- current-tbl_goals$Current[1]
perc_change <- delta/tbl_goals$Current[1]


tibble(" " = c("Current ($):", "Portfolio Gain:", "% Change Since Open:"), 
       "Result" = c(scales::dollar(current), scales::dollar(delta), scales::percent(perc_change))) %>% 
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE, escape = F, options = list(dom = 'rt')) %>% 
    formatStyle(
    " ",
    fontWeight = "bold")
```


```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE}
tbl_goals %>%
  mutate(
    Goal = dollar(Goal),
    Previous = lag(Current),
    diff = Current - Previous,
    delta = (Current - Previous) / Current,
    updwn = ifelse(delta > 0, "up", ifelse(delta < 0, "down", "neither")),
    icon = ifelse(delta > 0, fa("circle-up", fill="green"),
                  ifelse(delta < 0, fa("circle-down", fill="red"), "")),
    "Since Prev" = paste0(round(delta * 100, 2), "% ", icon),
    value_current = dollar(Current),
    Previous = dollar(Previous),
    diff = dollar(diff),
    Earnings = ifelse(Current > as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Goal)), "BEAT",
                      ifelse(Current < as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]", "", Goal)), "MISS", ""))
  ) %>%
  select(date, Earnings, Goal, "Current($)" = value_current, "Since Prev", "P/L ($)" = diff) %>%
  select(date, Earnings, Goal, "Current($)", "Since Prev", "P/L ($)") %>%
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE, escape = F,
                options = list(
                  dom = 'rt',
                  pageLength = 12,
                  autoWidth = TRUE)) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "Earnings",
    color = "white",
    backgroundPosition = 'center',
    backgroundColor = styleEqual(c("BEAT", "MISS"), c("green", "red"))
  )
 
```


### Plot balance
```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE}

pnl_daily <- rh %>% 
  group_by(date) %>% 
  summarise(value_usd = sum(value_usd)) %>% 
  mutate(
    diff = value_usd - lag(value_usd),
    delta = diff/value_usd)

pnl_daily %>% 
  select(date, "Current" = value_usd) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = Current))+
  geom_line( color="black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(shape=21, color="black", fill="#69b3a2", size=3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar())
  
```

### Fear & Greed
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width=10, fig.align='C'}

# Obtaining fear and greed crypto data
fear_greed_df <- tryCatch({
  response        <- GET("https://api.alternative.me/fng/?limit=1000",
                         add_headers(`User-Agent` = "Mozilla/5.0"))
  fear_greed_data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(rawToChar(response$content))
  df              <- fear_greed_data$data
  df$value        <- as.numeric(df$value)
  df$timestamp    <- as.Date(as.POSIXct(as.numeric(df$timestamp), origin = "1970-01-01"))
  df
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Fear & Greed API unavailable: ", e$message)
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(fear_greed_df)) {
  curr_value <- fear_greed_df[!is.na(fear_greed_df$time_until_update), ]$value_classification
  curr_time  <- fear_greed_df[!is.na(fear_greed_df$time_until_update), ]$timestamp

  print(
    fear_greed_df %>%
      filter(timestamp > today() - 200) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = timestamp, y = value)) +
      geom_line() +
      scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 week", date_labels = "%m-%d-%Y") +
      geom_point(size = 1) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Fear & Greed Index: Today We Feel ", curr_value),
              subtitle = paste0("(", curr_time, ")")) +
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            plot.title     = element_text(size = 22),
            axis.text.x    = element_text(angle = 90),
            axis.title.x   = element_blank())
  )
} else {
  cat("Fear & Greed data unavailable — API did not respond.")
}
```
